title: How do I submit an assignment in Canvas using Lucid?
plain_text: Lucid for Education is a suite of visual applications that offers a variety of tools to interact and engage with students. Lucidchart is a diagram application that allows for creating and sharing flowcharts, mind maps, and organizational charts. Lucidspark is a virtual whiteboard that allows for just-in-time collaboration for brainstorming, group projects, and collaborating between an entire class. Submit an assignment to Lucid Log in to Canvas and locate the course and module where the assignment is. Select your assignment. Select 'Start Assignment'. View and complete the Lucid assignment directly in Canvas. After completing the assignment, select the 'Submit Assignment' button.
body_html:
Lucid for Education is a suite of visual applications that offers a variety of tools to interact and engage with students. Lucidchart is a diagram application that allows for creating and sharing flowcharts, mind maps, and organizational charts. Lucidspark is a virtual whiteboard that allows for just-in-time collaboration for brainstorming, group projects, and collaborating between an entire class.

Submit an assignment to Lucid

  • Log in to Canvas and locate the course and module where the assignment is. Select your assignment.
  • Select 'Start Assignment'.
  • View and complete the Lucid assignment directly in Canvas.
  • After completing the assignment, select the 'Submit Assignment' button.

Lucidspark is a virtual whiteboard that allows for just-in-time collaboration for brainstorming, group projects, and collaborating between an entire class. Submit an assignment to Lucid: Log in to Canvas and locate the course and module where the assignment is. Select your assignment. Select 'Start Assignment'. View and complete the Lucid assignment directly in Canvas. After completing the assignment, select the 'Submit Assignment' button.
